ConsTree 1.0.0
  • Get started

  • Changelog

Package index

Consensus methods

Functions for computing consensus trees from a set of input trees.

Adams()
Adams consensus tree
Average()
Average consensus tree
Frequency()
Frequency-difference consensus tree
Greedy()
Greedy (extended majority-rule) consensus tree
Local()
Local consensus tree
Loose()
Loose consensus tree
Majority() MajorityRule() MR()
Majority-rule consensus tree
MajorityPlus()
Majority-rule (+) consensus tree
Quartet()
Consensus tree minimizing quartet distance
RStar()
R* consensus tree
Strict()
Strict consensus tree

BHV tree space

Functions for computing distances and means in the Billera–Holmes–Vogtmann tree space.

BHVDistance() BHVDist() BHV()
Geodesic (BHV) distance between trees
BHVMean() BHVVariance()
Fréchet mean and variance in BHV treespace

On this page

Developed by Martin R. Smith.
